provenance.notes: Original contract source and deployed Ethereum mainnet address are verified. Acclimated/ERC-721 contract address is verified from marketplace URLs and the registered Etherscan source. The historical MoonCatsWrapped address/source is reviewed separately for its wrapper token mapping behavior. MoonCatAccessories, MoonCatSVGs, and MoonCatAccessoryImages have compact exact-contract source reviews; their data files retain only source-confirmed behavior and limitations.

contracts.label: MoonCatRescue contract

artifactUrls.notes: Etherscan contract page reference for verified source and ABI sections. Artifacts are linked only; source text, ABI JSON, bytecode, constructor data, and storage values are not imported.
Raw Solidity source reference for the original contract. Source text is not duplicated in this file.

identifierNotes: Original source declares public bytes5[25600] rescueOrder; this supports rescue-order to bytes5 catId lookup.
The source does not expose a direct reverse bytes5 catId to rescue-order lookup.
contracts.notes: Original MoonCatRescue contract. Address verified from registered Etherscan source; source code verified from the original repository/raw Solidity source and Etherscan source-code badge.

contracts.label: Acclimated MoonCats contract

artifactUrls.notes: Etherscan contract page reference for verified source and ABI sections. Artifacts are linked only; source text, ABI JSON, bytecode, constructor data, and storage values are not imported.

contracts.notes: ERC-721/ERC-998 acclimated wrapper contract. Address appears in registered marketplace/project links and the registered Etherscan source. The Etherscan source shows MoonCatAcclimator wraps original MoonCats and mints tokenId equal to rescue order.

contracts.label: Wrapped MoonCatsRescue contract

artifactUrls.notes: Etherscan contract page reference for verified source and ABI sections. Artifacts are linked only; source text, ABI JSON, bytecode, constructor data, storage values, and mapping contents are not imported.

contracts.roleSummary: Historical unofficial ERC-721 wrapper for original MoonCatsRescue, named Wrapped MoonCatsRescue with symbol WMCR.
functionSummary: wrap(bytes5) accepts a bytes5 cat ID, consumes its adoption offer, assigns a sequential wrapper token ID when the mapping is unassigned, and stores both cat-to-token and token-to-cat mappings.
unwrap(uint256) resolves the mapped bytes5 cat ID, returns it through the original MoonCatRescue contract, burns the wrapper token, and emits the source-defined event.
_catIDToTokenID(bytes5) and _tokenIDToCatID(uint256) expose the mapping-backed identifier relationship.
name(), symbol(), ownerOf(...), tokenURI(...), totalSupply(), tokenByIndex(...), and tokenOfOwnerByIndex(...) expose the ERC-721 surface.
identifierNotes: The source accepts bytes5 cat IDs directly and assigns wrapper token IDs from a counter starting at zero.
The source contains no rescueOrder field or conversion; WMCR token IDs must not be treated as rescue order or as current Acclimated token IDs.
Relating a WMCR token ID to a bytes5 cat ID requires the contract's explicit mapping getter or source-defined wrap/unwrap event context.
limitations: This exact contract review does not establish behavior for other historical or unofficial wrappers.
No full mapping contents, event history, current ownership, supply, marketplace activity, or per-token dataset is imported.
contracts.notes: Historical unofficial ERC-721 wrapper. Etherscan verifies the source as an exact match for MoonCatsWrapped with Solidity compiler v0.7.6 and optimization disabled. Compact mapping-backed token identifier behavior is recorded in data/older-wrapper-internals.json.

contracts.label: MoonCatReference contract

artifactUrls.notes: Etherscan contract page reference for verified source and ABI sections. Artifacts are linked only; source text, ABI JSON, bytecode, constructor data, and storage values are not imported.

contracts.roleSummary: On-chain documentation/reference registry for MoonCat-related contract pages.
functionSummary: doc() and doc(address) expose stored name, description, and details records.
doc(uint256), contractAddressByIndex(uint256), and totalContracts() expose indexed registered contract documentation.
setDoc(...), batchSetDocs(...), and updateDetails(...) write or update documentation records.
owner(), transferOwnership(...), withdrawForeignERC20(...), and withdrawForeignERC721(...) provide ownership and asset-recovery administration.
limitations: Summary is limited to Etherscan verified ABI/function surface; no stored documentation text is imported here.
contracts.notes: On-chain materialization support contract linked from the official MoonCatRescue Chained to the Future log page. Etherscan verifies the source as exact match for contract name MoonCatReference with Solidity compiler v0.8.1, optimization enabled with 200 runs, and GNU AGPLv3 license.

contracts.label: MoonCatTraits contract

artifactUrls.notes: Etherscan contract page reference for verified source and ABI sections. Artifacts are linked only; source text, ABI JSON, bytecode, constructor data, and storage values are not imported.

functionSummary: rescueYearOf(uint256) returns the calendar rescue year bucket for a rescue-order value.
kTraitsOf(bytes5) and kTraitsOf(uint256) expose compact trait fields for a cat ID or rescue order.
traitsOf(bytes5) and traitsOf(uint256) expose human-readable trait fields; the rescue-order overload also returns catId, rescueYear, and whether the original contract has a recorded name.
ownerOf(uint256), catIdOf(uint256), and nameOf(...) read owner, cat ID, and name data through the original MoonCatRescue contract, with owner lookup accounting for registered ERC-721 proxy ownership.
doc(), setERC721Proxy(...), setReferenceContract(...), transferOwnership(...), withdrawForeignERC20(...), and withdrawForeignERC721(...) provide documentation lookup and administration.
limitations: No trait mapping table or bit-level derivation is imported here.
Identifier conversion use is limited to the documented rescueOrder-to-catId lookup; no reverse on-chain lookup is documented here.
contracts.notes: On-chain materialization support contract linked from the official MoonCatRescue Chained to the Future log page. Etherscan verifies the source as exact match for contract name MoonCatTraits with Solidity compiler v0.8.1, optimization enabled with 200 runs, and GNU AGPLv3 license.

contracts.label: MoonCatColors contract

artifactUrls.notes: Etherscan contract page reference for verified source and ABI sections. Artifacts are linked only; source text, ABI JSON, bytecode, constructor data, and storage values are not imported.

contracts.roleSummary: On-chain MoonCat and accessory color reference/palette-generation contract.
functionSummary: RGBToHue(...), hueToRGB(...), and deriveColors(...) provide RGB/HSL hue and palette-generation helpers.
mapColors(...) records owner-managed hard-coded palettes for edge cases before finalization.

glowOf(...), colorsOf(...), accessoryColorsOf(...), colorAlpha(...), paletteOf(...), hueName(...), and hueIntOf(...) expose color, palette, alpha, and hue lookup functions for cat IDs or rescue orders.
doc(), finalize(), setReferenceContract(...), transferOwnership(...), withdrawForeignERC20(...), and withdrawForeignERC721(...) provide documentation lookup and administration.
limitations: No color palette values, hue-name table, or accessory color data is imported here.
No color semantics beyond the source-level role/function surface are asserted.
contracts.notes: On-chain materialization support contract linked from the official MoonCatRescue Chained to the Future log page. Etherscan verifies the source as exact match for contract name MoonCatColors with Solidity compiler v0.8.1, optimization enabled with 200 runs, and GNU AGPLv3 license.

contracts.label: MoonCatSVGs contract

artifactUrls.notes: Etherscan contract page reference for verified source and ABI sections. Artifacts are linked only; source text, ABI JSON, bytecode, constructor data, and storage values are not imported.

functionSummary: flip(...), polygon(...), setPixel(...), pixelGroup(...), getPattern(...), colorGroup(...), glowGroup(...), getPixelData(...), svgTag(...), and boundingBox(...) assemble SVG pixel/shape groups from trait and color inputs.
imageOf(bytes5), imageOf(bytes5,bool), imageOf(uint256), and imageOf(uint256,bool) return SVG image strings for cat IDs or rescue orders, with overloads for explicit glow behavior.

Source review confirms imageOf(bytes5,bool) reads MoonCatTraits.kTraitsOf(catId) and MoonCatColors.colorsOf(catId), builds pixel data, optionally applies glowGroup with the first colorsOf RGB triple, computes a bounding box, and returns an SVG string.

Source review confirms rescue-order overloads require rescueOrder < 25440 and use MoonCatRescue.rescueOrder(rescueOrder), while imageOf(bytes5) derives default glow from MoonCatRescue.catOwners(catId) compared with the stored Acclimated contract address.
uint2str(...) is a string-formatting helper used by SVG generation.
doc(), setReferenceContract(...), transferOwnership(...), withdrawForeignERC20(...), and withdrawForeignERC721(...) provide documentation lookup and administration.
limitations: No SVG coordinate data, pattern arrays, or rendered output is imported here.
No image-generation correctness claim is made beyond the verified source function surface and compact review in data/mooncat-svg-internals.json.
Accessory image composition remains scoped to MoonCatAccessoryImages and is not covered by the MoonCatSVGs internals review.
contracts.notes: On-chain materialization support contract linked from the official MoonCatRescue Chained to the Future log page. Etherscan verifies the source as exact match for contract name MoonCatSVGs with Solidity compiler v0.8.1, optimization enabled with 200 runs, and GNU AGPLv3 license. Compact internals review is recorded in data/mooncat-svg-internals.json.

contracts.label: MoonCatAccessories contract

artifactUrls.notes: Exact verified source and ABI page; source text, ABI JSON, bytecode, storage, accessory definitions, and state are not imported.

contracts.roleSummary: On-chain accessory definition, management, sale, rescue-order assignment, eligibility, and mutable wear-state contract for Acclimated MoonCats.
functionSummary: createAccessory and ownerCreateAccessory append definition-array entries whose accessoryId is the array index.
buyAccessory/buyAccessories and managerApplyAccessory append one OwnedAccessory under a rescue order after source-defined authorization and supply checks.
alterAccessory/alterAccessories change a stored record's paletteIndex and zIndex; zIndex zero means owned but not worn.
balanceOf/ownedAccessoryByIndex/doesMoonCatOwnAccessory expose rescue-order ownership; managerOf and the address balance/enumeration overloads expose separate definition management.
accessoryInfo, accessoryImageData, palette, eligibility, fee, freeze, metadata, management-transfer, discontinuation, and foreign-asset rescue surfaces are reviewed compactly in the details file.
limitations: No accessory definitions, taxonomy, image bytes, palettes, state, per-cat ownership, prices, supply, event history, or current administration are imported.
Accessory records are not ERC-721 tokens; definition management and rescue-order ownership are distinct roles.
contracts.notes: Etherscan reports exact-match verified source, compiler v0.8.1+commit.df193b15, optimization with 200 runs, default EVM version, and GNU AGPLv3. Compact lifecycle review is in data/mooncat-accessories-internals.json.

contracts.label: MoonCatAccessoryImages contract

artifactUrls.notes: Etherscan contract page reference for verified source and ABI sections. Artifacts are linked only; source text, ABI JSON, bytecode, constructor data, and storage values are not imported.

contracts.roleSummary: On-chain MoonCat accessory image composition and PNG helper contract.
functionSummary: accessorizedImageOf(...) overloads return accessorized SVG strings for a rescue order, optionally with glow level, explicit OwnedAccessory data, and an allowUnverified flag.
accessoryPNG(uint256,uint256,uint16) returns a base64 PNG data URI for a rescue order, accessory ID, and palette index.
placementOf(...) returns source-computed placement metadata for a rescue order and accessory ID.
prepAccessories(...) verifies supplied accessory ownership, prepares foreground/background records, and sorts each list by z-index.
crc32(...), generatePNGChunk(...), PNGHeader(), and PNGFooter() expose PNG construction helpers/constants.
doc(), setReferenceContract(...), transferOwnership(...), withdrawForeignERC20(...), and withdrawForeignERC721(...) provide documentation lookup and administration.
limitations: Detailed compact semantics are limited to the verified source review in data/mooncat-accessory-images-internals.json; this contract index does not import source text, ABI JSON, PNG bytes, or output artifacts.
No accessory ID taxonomy, placement table, palette values, accessory image data, current state, or exact rendered output is imported.
contracts.notes: On-chain materialization support contract linked from the official MoonCatRescue Chained to the Future log page. Etherscan verifies the source as exact match for contract name MoonCatAccessoryImages with Solidity compiler v0.8.1, optimization enabled with 200 runs, and GNU AGPLv3 license. Compact source review is recorded in data/mooncat-accessory-images-internals.json.
